scenario_name: Scenario 12 — Pattern Matching with Existing Codebase
justification: All rubric criteria met: file paths follow .tmp/warehouses/warehouse-*.ts kebab-case pattern, WarehouseRepository is an interface, WarehouseService injects repository via constructor, AppError reused from ../shared/app-error (no new error class), error code is WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND matching the pattern, updateCapacity calls repo.save, tests use mock repository, and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 3 ACs with 5 passing tests.

observations.text: All 3 ACs explicitly mapped with test coverage details
AppError correctly reused from shared module, not recreated
File paths follow exact kebab-case convention (.tmp/warehouses/warehouse-*.ts)
Two tests for AC2 (code check + instanceof) shows thoroughness
AC3 includes both happy path (save called) and guard path (not-found)
Agent reports files already existed rather than creating them — unclear if Shaq actually wrote the code or just verified pre-existing work
